We are in favor of
asthetics in a details
Design , that is inspired by
nature
Start 01
We start by studying your project, taking all needed measurements and choosing style for it.
Plan 02
Then, we process a point-by-point plan and present several examples for you.
Visualization 03
At this stage we create detailed visualization for each room to provide you with an overall picture.
Album 04
The design project album with all plans and visualizations is ready.
Free
3d tour

work stages

10 years experience in combination with a perfect taste

Our mission goes beyond creating aesthetically refined spaces.

Through design, we help individuals uncover and express their inner world — their character, values, and unspoken desires. We believe that the external environment has the power to transform the internal state, and that a well-designed space can become a catalyst for clarity, balance, and personal alignment.

At NKEY, design is a tool for self-discovery.
It helps close unfinished emotional chapters, resolve inner tensions, and bring coherence between who a person is and the space they live in.

our mission

working worldwide
